title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy · Risk Brief: Event Trust
summary: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates event trust increment in a required CI quality-gate workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate trusted branch workflows from untrusted pull-request code and secrets.
Make failures concise, reproducible locally, and linked to remediation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
